top_signals.title: Gold Slumps as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Path After Iran Oil Waiver
top_signals.summary: Gold slumped after the US Treasury Department revoked a waiver allowing the sale of Iranian oil, stoking concern that elevated energy prices will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Canadians Skeptical of Carney’s Push to Open Airports to Private Investment
top_signals.summary: A slim majority of Canadians oppose allowing private investment in airports, a new poll shows, as Prime Minister Mark Carney explores selling stakes in the publicly owned facilities to unlock funding for major infrastructure projects.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Soccer Shows the Real Bull Case for Europe
top_signals.summary: Can you put a price on history?
